final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 vertical 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) lifestyle content.

Style/medium: needs a "干净、高级、治愈感" aesthetic with "ins风" and "小红书爆款封面" direction — references in the spirit of 2010s Instagram lifestyle flatlay photography, Muji minimalist editorial design, Korean wellness brand visual identity (e.g., Aesop, Innisfree); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), each cell complete and centered, clear boundaries between cells for clean slicing, all text in Chinese, generous whitespace, magazine-quality typography
Subject: must include 9 grid cells with sleep wellness content:
  Cell 1 (cover): 大标题"让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" + 副标题"失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" + 柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩等治愈睡眠元素
  Cell 2: 标题"1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" + 正文"蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" + 手机、月亮、困倦表情插画
  Cell 3: 标题"2. 睡前把灯光调暗" + 正文"暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" + 床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  Cell 4: 标题"3. 房间温度别太高" + 正文"稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" + 空调、温度计、被子
  Cell 5: 标题"4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" + 正文"咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" + 咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  Cell 6: 标题"5. 睡前洗个热水澡" + 正文"能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" + 浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  Cell 7: 标题"6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" + 正文"把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" + 笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  Cell 8: 标题"7. 固定上床时间" + 正文"每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" + 时钟、月亮、床
  Cell 9: 标题"8. 试试深呼吸放松法" + 正文"吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" + 底部小字"收藏这组，今晚试试看" + 呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星
Scene/backdrop: must be unified cream/beige/oatmeal background throughout all 9 cells
Lighting/mood: needs a "温柔治愈" atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant with dark brown text accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a "轻拟物插画" surface treatment with soft illustrations — exact illustration style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified in each cell above
Constraints: must preserve 3×3 grid structure for clean slicing into 9 individual posts, each cell must work as standalone image, no text overlapping grid lines, professional editorial quality, no cheap marketing feel
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing aesthetics, over-decoration, English text, text garbling, text overlapping cell boundaries
